---
name: Security Concern
about: Report a non-critical security concern or request a security review
title: "[SECURITY] "
labels: security
assignees: ''
---

> **⚠️ IMPORTANT**: If you are reporting an active vulnerability, **do NOT** use
> this template. Follow the [Security Policy](../../SECURITY.md) for
> confidential reporting via GitHub Security Advisories.

## Security Concern

Describe the security concern, hardening request, or compliance gap.

## Category

- [ ] Authentication / Authorization
- [ ] Input Validation
- [ ] Cryptography
- [ ] Data Protection (CUI / HIPAA)
- [ ] Container / Infrastructure Hardening
- [ ] Dependency / Supply Chain
- [ ] Logging / Audit
- [ ] Compliance Gap (CMMC / NIST / STIG)
- [ ] Other: ___

## Affected Component(s)

List the services or components affected.

## Current Behavior

Describe the current state and why it is a concern.

## Desired State

Describe the expected secure behavior.

## Compliance Reference

Link to the applicable control or requirement (e.g., NIST 800-171 AC-2, CMMC
Practice, DISA STIG rule ID).

## Priority Assessment

- [ ] Critical — Active exploitability
- [ ] High — Significant risk, no active exploit
- [ ] Medium — Defense-in-depth improvement
- [ ] Low — Best practice enhancement
